Home › Blog › AI Video Generators Benchmarked

Runway Gen-4 vs Pika 2.0 vs Kling 2 vs Sora: AI Video Benchmarked

By Lao Lu · Also on lusdaily.com

Quick Verdict

Runway Gen-4 leads in quality and control. Pika 2.0 wins on speed. Kling 2 best human motion. Sora most cinematic quality.

Pricing

PlatformFree TierPaid PlanMax Length
Runway Gen-4125 credits$15/mo10s
Pika 2.0250 credits$10/mo8s
Kling 2Limited free$8/mo10s
SoraChatGPT Plus$20/mo20s

Quality by Use Case

Use CaseBest ToolWhy
Cinematic scenesSoraBest lighting and composition
Product demosRunwayBest object consistency
Social media clipsPikaFastest generation, templates
Human motionKlingMost realistic movement

FAQ

Not yet. Great for short clips and B-roll, but complex editing still needs humans.
